articles.title: 'I was a prisoner in my home': Drug gangs 'cuckooing' hundreds of homes a week, police warn
articles.description: Hundreds if not thousands of people's homes are being taken over by UK gangs every week, say police.

articles.title: Billionaire West Ham co-owner accused of abusing his power and preying on women for sex
articles.description: Women say David Sullivan told them they needed to have sex with him to feature in his newspapers.

articles.title: Football regulator 'in contact' with West Ham over Sullivan
articles.description: Multiple women accuse the billionaire of abusing his power and preying on them for sex, in some cases when they were in their late teens.

articles.title: Iran and Israel say they will pause strikes but warn of retaliation if ceasefire breached again
articles.description: Israel's PM says his country is holding fire "at the moment", after Iran's armed forces said they had stopped military action.
